plugins.name: luly-v0-2-6
plugins.description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.6 reverts the academy lesson exit to the default close-icon (luly-app now hard-enforces icon-only topRight controls so content can't override), documents the four border-radius CSS vars the renderer reads, and adds a block-shape consistency rule to luly-fill so story screens don't toggle between image and text-only mid-arc.
